meta.document_name: Periodic Safety Update Report (PSUR) / PMCF Report

sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.section_prompt: State that this PSUR consolidates post-market data for {device_name_model} during the reporting period per EU MDR Article 86 (class IIa: at least every 2 years; class IIb/III: annually), updating benefit-risk and feeding {ref:RD-007} and {ref:RA-002}.

sections.title: 3. Quantitative Summary
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate metrics: total complaints, complaint rate per 1000 units, serious incidents (vigilance), FSCA initiated, returns rate, top 5 failure modes, software defects critical, cybersecurity incidents. Threshold from {ref:RA-005}. Return JSON array.

sections.title: 4. Qualitative Analysis
sections.section_prompt: Provide narrative analysis: trend interpretation, comparison to previous period, root causes of any signal, conclusions on benefit-risk for {device_name_model}, and any updates required to risk file {ref:RD-007} or IFU {ref:RA-007}.

sections.title: 5. PMCF Activities & Findings
sections.section_prompt: Summarise PMCF activities executed during the period (registries, surveys, literature, real-world studies) and findings. State whether the clinical evaluation needs to be updated.

sections.title: 6. Conclusions & Actions
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate 4–6 conclusion/action rows. Actions reference CAPA ({ref:CA-001}), FSCA ({ref:CA-006}), risk update ({ref:RD-007}), labelling change ({ref:RA-007}), or no action required. Return JSON array.

output_config.footer: CONFIDENTIAL — Controlled Record | EU MDR Art. 86
